title: Public App Content Loading
interaction_flow: Browser/DOM → init(): DOMContentLoaded (or immediate if already loaded)
init() → initAnchorScroll(): setup anchor scroll behavior
init() → initHashTracking(): setup hash tracking
init() → initLensEffect(): setup lens UI effect
init() → initScrollReveal(): setup scroll reveal animations
init() → initGlassTerminal(): initialize glass terminal component
init() → initFrameworkViz(): initialize framework visualization
init() → initFoundationGrid(): initialize foundation grid
init() → initSectionNav(): initialize section navigation
init() → loadContent(): async content fetch and render
init() → Browser/DOM: document.body.classList.add('loaded')
loadContent() → fetch API: GET /api/commands (parallel)
loadContent() → fetch API: GET /api/patterns (parallel)
fetch API → loadContent(): commandsRes (Response)
fetch API → loadContent(): patternsRes (Response)
loadContent() → loadContent(): check commandsRes.ok, throw if false
loadContent() → loadContent(): check patternsRes.ok, throw if false
loadContent() → loadContent(): allCommands = await commandsRes.json()
loadContent() → loadContent(): patternsData = await patternsRes.json()
loadContent() → renderTerminalLayout(allCommands): render commands in Glass Terminal
loadContent() → initGalleryStack(): setup gallery card stack UI
loadContent() → renderPatternsWithTabs(patternsData.patterns, patternsData.antipatterns): render tabbed patterns
[ERROR] loadContent() → showLoadError(error): on any fetch/parse/HTTP error
renderPatternsWithTabs() → escapeHtml(cat.name): sanitize category names for tabs
renderPatternsWithTabs() → escapeHtml(item): sanitize each pattern/antipattern item
renderPatternsWithTabs() → Browser/DOM: set container.innerHTML (tabs + panels HTML)
renderPatternsWithTabs() → Browser/DOM: addEventListener('click') for tab switching
showLoadError() → Browser/DOM: querySelector('.commands-gallery') → set innerHTML with error UI
showLoadError() → Browser/DOM: getElementById('patterns-categories') → set innerHTML with error UI
initGalleryStack() → Browser/DOM: querySelector('.gallery-stack-container'), getElementById('gallery-stack')
initGalleryStack() → Browser/DOM: bind prev/next buttons click events
initGalleryStack() → Browser/DOM: bind wheel event on stack for scroll navigation
initGalleryStack() → update(): set card data-offset attributes to reflect current index
key_relationships: init() orchestrates all component initializations and calls loadContent()
renderPatternsWithTabs() depends_on escapeHtml() for XSS prevention
showLoadError() writes to two DOM mount points: .commands-gallery and #patterns-categories
loadContent() error path delegates entirely to showLoadError()
allCommands is module-level state, set by loadContent()
conditional_logic: document.readyState === 'loading' → addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init) ELSE init() immediately
commandsRes.ok === false → throw Error('Commands API failed: <status>')
patternsRes.ok === false → throw Error('Patterns API failed: <status>')
wheel event: if (now - lastScroll < 350) → debounce, return early
wheel event: e.deltaY > 0 → next() ELSE prev()
tab click: e.target.closest('.patterns-tab') null check before activating
data_flow: patternsData.antipatterns mapped to antipatternMap{name: items[]} for O(1) lookup by category name
Each pattern category and item sanitized via escapeHtml() before DOM injection
important_notes: Both API fetches are parallel via Promise.all(). Error handling is coarse-grained: any failure (HTTP error or JSON parse) jumps to showLoadError(), rendering error UI in both DOM sections. escapeHtml() guards against XSS in all dynamic content. GalleryStack is purely DOM-driven with no external data dependency. Tab navigation uses event delegation on the container element.
